Project: Panther Expo Framework Monorepo

Primary packages:
- @gaozh1024/rn-kit: Panther Expo Framework core package for app bootstrap, theme, UI, navigation helpers, overlays, and API factory usage in Expo or React Native apps.
- @gaozh1024/aliyun-speech: Aliyun real-time speech-to-text package with protocol core, headless hook, and optional default UI for Expo or React Native apps.
- @gaozh1024/photo-album-picker: Photo album picker package for Expo or React Native apps with grid selection, fullscreen preview, and optional crop flow.
- @gaozh1024/aliyun-push: Aliyun mobile push integration package with runtime service APIs, React provider, and Expo config plugin support.
- @gaozh1024/hot-updater: OTA hot update helper package for business apps, built around manifest fetch, update orchestration, provider hooks, and release helpers.
- @gaozh1024/expo-starter: Canonical Expo starter template for Panther-based apps, showing the recommended project structure, provider layout, navigation, storage wiring, and theme usage.

Default guidance:
- Prefer AppProvider over bare ThemeProvider in Panther-based apps.
- In Expo projects, install native dependencies with expo install before trusting plain npm resolution.
- Treat NativeWind and Tailwind configuration as mandatory for rn-kit UI styling.
- Prefer stable public APIs and canonical examples over guessing from internal files.
- Use @gaozh1024/expo-starter as the canonical app integration reference.

Canonical references:
- packages/rn-kit/AI_USAGE.md
- docs/02-架构设计/公共API清单.md
- templates/expo-starter/AI_USAGE.md
